plugins.name: octo-rounds
plugins.description: Round-aware fork of nyldn/claude-octopus v9.29.2. Adds per-PR review iteration state — second `/octo:review` on the same PR sees prior findings + git diff since last review and classifies each prior finding as addressed/persistent/regressed. Everything else upstream-identical. See feat/round-aware-reviews branch + upstream issue #322 for context.
